Notice Of Motion Of Plaintiffs Motion Terminating Sanctions
Off Calendar Dec-03-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Lawrence L. Lockwood, esq. (707-647-2205) for Plaintiff REVIVER FINANCIAL, LLC.
No other appearances.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF REVIVER FINANCIAL, LLC's Motion Terminating Sanctions.

No opposition filed, terminating sanctions granted and answer stricken. No other sanctions ordered.

Order is signed.

Judge Pro Tem: Robert F. Kane , Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE

Notice Of Motion For Order For Deemed Admissions And Sanctions Thereon
Off Calendar Aug-20-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Philip T. Kilduff, Attorney at Law, specially appearing for plaintiff Reviver Financial, LLC, Telephone (415)397-4345;
No other appearance.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF REVIVER FINANCIAL, LLC.'S Motion For Order For Deemed Admissions And Sanctions Thereon.

Motion granted. The RFAs will be deemed admitted unless Defendant provides responses at or before the hearing on this matter. Sanctions in the amount of $200 imposed against Defendant.

Order is signed.

Judge Pro Tem: David McDonald; Clerk: William Trupek; Not reported. (302/JPT)

MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Philip T. Kilduff, Attorney at Law, specially appearing for plaintiff Reviver Financial, LLC, Telephone (415)397-4345;
No other appearance.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF REVIVER FINANCIAL, LLC.'S Motion For Order Compelling Response To Interrogatories And For Sanctions Thereon.

Motion granted. Responses to be served by September 14, 2018. Sanctions in the amount of $200 imposed against Defendant.

Order is signed.

Judge Pro Tem: David McDonald; Clerk: William Trupek; Not reported. (302/JPT)
